apis.note: real draft-18 wire codec (src/moq-wire.ts) + pub/sub fan-out relay (src/moq-relay.ts) over a WebSocket transport binding in the session DO; WebTransport binding drops in when CF ships the server API. MPEG-TS ingest (src/moq-ingest.ts) demuxes a TS multiplex into per-track MoQ tracks; per-track subscription via src/moq-trackset.ts lets a viewer subscribe to captions independently of video

thirdParty.note: draft-ietf-moq-transport-18 wire codec (varint §1.4.1, namespace tuple §1.4.2, control framing §10, object model §11) — constants read verbatim from the moq-wg GitHub source at the draft-18 tag

note: Cloudflare Worker + Durable Object MoQ relay (sub-second live media). CONSUMES the engine R4 metering contract by mirroring it in TS (src/wave-usage.ts) — the edge can't link the C++ core, so every MoQ usage event has the SAME wave.usage shape as native adapters → one billing/observability path. See GUARDRAIL.md (media engine) Rule 2.
